raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against American Express National Bank regarding their failure to properly investigate and resolve a fraudulent charge on my account. 

On XX/XX/year>, a charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX appeared on my American Express Platinum Card. I did not authorize this transaction and have never conducted business with this entity. 

I promptly reported this charge as fraud. American Express initially issued a provisional credit, but later reversed it after claiming that I had provided my account information to the merchant. This conclusion is incorrect and appears to rely solely on statements from the merchant. 

I disputed the charge again, and the same pattern occurred : a temporary credit was issued and then reversed. American Express has now formally denied my claim and closed the case. 

At no point has American Express provided any verifiable evidence that I authorized this transaction. Despite multiple requests, they have failed to provide : Any signed authorization or agreement Any authenticated transaction record IP address, device identification, or geolocation data AVS/CVV verification tied to me Any communication between myself and the merchant Instead, American Express appears to have relied solely on merchant assertions. This does not meet the requirement of a reasonable investigation under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ). 

Additionally, American Express has mischaracterized this matter as a cancellation or merchant dispute, despite the fact that I never authorized the transaction in the first place. 

They have repeatedly reversed provisional credits without substantiating their decision with evidence and have improperly placed the burden on me to resolve the matter with the merchant. 

I am requesting that the CFPB require American Express to : Reopen the investigation under the proper classification of fraud/unauthorized use Provide verifiable proof of authorization, if such evidence exists Permanently remove the charge from my account Reinstate all reversed credits Ensure that no negative reporting results from this matter I acted promptly and in good faith in reporting this fraudulent activity. American Express has failed to meet its obligations under federal law. 

I am seeking immediate resolution of this matter.
